Design system  /  Components  /  ADR table
AdrTable + AdrStatus · architecture-decision-record index for technical-docs pages
IDTitleStatusDate
001Schema-first designAccepted2025-03-14
002Storage adapter interfaceAccepted2025-04-02
003GraphQL alongside RESTAccepted2025-06-21
004Audit log signingAccepted2025-09-08
005Single-table inheritanceSuperseded2025-10-15
006Event-driven webhooksProposed2026-02-01
007Per-tenant key rotationDraft2026-03-22
008Synchronous CRDT mergeRejected2026-04-09
React / MDX usage

Mount in MDX as <AdrTable/>

Architecture-decision-record index. Four columns (ID, Title, Status, Date) with a colour-coded status pill. Used at the top of every technical-docs.html page to give an at-a-glance view of which decisions are accepted, superseded, or still in flight.

Status colours

  • Accepted — mint-green pill (the decision is live)
  • Proposed — cobalt-100 pill (under discussion)
  • Draft — orange pill (not yet up for review)
  • Superseded — cobalt-50 muted pill (replaced by a newer ADR; the row stays in the table for history)
  • Rejected — vermillion pill (decided against; kept for history)

Import & example

import {AdrTable} from '@conduction/docusaurus-preset/components';

<AdrTable
  items={[
    {id: '001', title: 'Schema-first design',        status: 'accepted',   date: '2025-03-14'},
    {id: '002', title: 'Storage adapter interface',  status: 'accepted',   date: '2025-04-02'},
    {id: '005', title: 'Single-table inheritance',   status: 'superseded', date: '2025-10-15'},
    {id: '006', title: 'Event-driven webhooks',      status: 'proposed',   date: '2026-02-01'},
  ]}
/>

Props

  • items array of {id, title, status, date, href?}. Setting href turns the title into a link to the full ADR.
  • status one of accepted / proposed / draft / superseded / rejected
